PU_POLYESTER.description: Traditional polyurethane foam with polyester resin.
trade_offs: can pressure-dent and absorb water after damage

EPS_EPOXY.description: Expanded polystyrene foam with epoxy resin.
trade_offs: can feel corky or chattery depending on build

STRINGERLESS_COMPOSITE.description: Composite reinforcement replaces or supplements a traditional stringer.
trade_offs: cannot be inferred from marketing name alone

WOOD_OR_BAMBOO_SKIN.description: Wood veneer or skin used for reinforcement and flex control.

CARBON_REINFORCED.description: Carbon placed strategically for stiffness, recoil or durability.
trade_offs: may feel stiff for some surfers or conditions

SOFT_TOP.description: Soft deck or full soft construction designed for safety and learning.

rules: Do not reduce construction advice to stronger equals better.
Construction feel is model- and brand-specific.
Use official Quivrr construction data where available; general guidance is secondary.
